_meta.description: Phish studio album discography for album-recency signal testing. Song titles use phish.net canonical spellings where known.
_meta.source: Wikipedia album pages cross-referenced with phish.net song database (for canonical titles). Track titles prefer phish.net spelling over album liner notes when they differ.

albums.name: Junta
albums.notes: Original 1988 cassette self-release; 1989-05-08 is the date commonly cited for the widely-circulated Elektra version. Disc 2 of the CD (Union Federal, Sanity, Icculus) is a bonus live recording. phish.net canonical: 'Divided Sky' (no 'The'). 'Fluffhead' and 'Fluff's Travels' are separate songs in phish.net's DB.

albums.name: Lawn Boy
albums.notes: Original Absolute A Go Go cassette release included 'Fee' as a bonus; Elektra 1992 CD reissue omits it. We exclude 'Fee' here since it is canonically on Junta.

albums.name: A Picture of Nectar
albums.notes: phish.net uses 'Chalk Dust Torture' (with space) as the canonical form.

albums.name: Rift
albums.notes: Album has two 'Lengthwise' tracks (tracks 3 and 13) — deduplicated to one song here since phish.net treats them as the same song. Track 13 on Wikipedia is 'Lengthwise (reprise)' with compressed snippets.

albums.name: Hoist
albums.notes: Final album track on Hoist is a medley listed as 'Demand / Split Open and Melt Jam / Yerushalayim Shel Zahav'. phish.net treats 'Demand' and 'Yerushalayim Shel Zahav' as separate songs (the SOAM jam is a live excerpt, not a separate studio song), so we split them. 'Split Open and Melt' is already on Lawn Boy and not duplicated here.

albums.name: Billy Breathes
albums.notes: 'Cars Trucks Buses' has no ampersand/commas on phish.net. 'Swept Away' and 'Steep' are often played together as a pair but are separate phish.net song entries.

albums.name: Farmhouse
albums.notes: phish.net canonical: 'The Inlaw Josie Wales' (with 'The'). 'Gotta Jibboo' and 'First Tube' originated with Trey Anastasio Band but appear on this Phish studio album.

albums.name: Undermind
tracks: A Song I Heard the Ocean Sing
albums.notes: phish.net tracks 'Scents and Subtle Sounds (Intro)' and 'Scents and Subtle Sounds' as distinct songs (the intro was played as a standalone on 8/15/2021). Both included here as on the album.

albums.name: Joy
tracks: Stealing Time From the Faulty Plan

albums.name: Big Boat
tracks: No Men In No Man's Land
I Always Wanted It This Way
albums.notes: phish.net canonical: 'No Men In No Man's Land' (capital 'In').

albums.name: Sigma Oasis
albums.notes: Surprise-released during the COVID-19 pandemic. 'Mercury' and 'Shade' were originally recorded during the Big Boat sessions but cut from that album.

albums.name: Evolve
albums.notes: Standard 12-track digital/CD release. Vinyl edition adds a 13th track 'The Well' between 'Valdese' and 'Mercy'; excluded here since the task says prefer the standard studio release when editions differ.
